## 3. UX Flow

> Navigation flow — happy path first, then alternative paths.

1. User opens the app → arrives at **Dashboard** (UI-001)
2. User clicks **New Project** → {{action and result}}
3. User selects a project → navigates to **Project Detail** (UI-002)
4. {{Continue the flow…}}
